value.name: broker
value.description: IP address or hostname of MQTT broker.

value.name: port
value.description: Port the broker is listening on.

value.name: username
value.description: Username for the broker.

value.name: password
value.description: Password for the broker.

value.name: client_id
value.description:
Client ID used when connecting to broker.
Also used as the base for all topics, if base_topic is not set.

value.name: base_topic
value.description: Base topic for all MQTT messages. If not set, client_id is used.

value.name: last_will_topic
value.description: Last will topic.

value.name: publish_states_on_reconnect
value.description: Publish states of all entities on broker reconnect.

value.name: discovery_prefix
value.description: Discovery prefix.

value.name: retain_config
value.description: Retain config topic messages.

value.name: publish_ha_config_on_reconnect
value.description: Publish Home Assistant MQTT Discovery config of all entities on broker reconnect.

value.name: home_assistant
value.description: See Home Assistant MQTT Discovery.

value.name: topic
value.description: MQTT topic to subscribe to for motion state messages.
If true, detected motion will start the recorder.

value.name: trigger_event_recording
value.description: If true, detected motion will trigger an event recording.

value.name: recorder_keepalive
value.description: If true, recording will continue until no motion is detected.

value.name: max_recorder_keepalive
value.description:
Value in seconds for how long motion is allowed to keep the recorder going when no objects are detected.
Use this to prevent never-ending recordings.
Only applicable if recorder_keepalive: true.
A value of 0 disables this functionality.

value.name: max_motion_duration
value.description:
Value in seconds for the maximum time motion is allowed to stay active before being automatically cleared.
Acts as a safety net for external motion sources that may fail to send an off signal.
A value of 0 disables this functionality.

value.name: payload_on
value.description: Payload that indicates motion has started. Ignored when the payload is JSON with a detected boolean field.

value.name: payload_off
value.description: Payload that indicates motion has stopped. Ignored when the payload is JSON with a detected boolean field.
Camera identifier. Valid characters are lowercase a-z, numbers and underscores.

value.name: cameras
value.description: Camera-specific configuration. All subordinate keys corresponds to the camera_identifier of a configured camera.

value.name: motion_detector
value.description: Use MQTT messages as an external motion source for one or more cameras.
